overview: A production-level Personal Finance Manager that lets you track income, expenses, and budgets. Features a live dashboard with charts, full transaction management with categories and filters, monthly budget tracking, and authentication.
features: Dashboard with balance, income, and expense summary cards
Monthly income vs. expense bar chart using Recharts
Add, edit, and delete transactions with categories
Filter transactions by date and category
Set monthly budgets with progress tracking and remaining balance
Authentication UI with local storage persistence
Protected routes for logged-in users only
Responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
